models.name: AuditStamp
models.doc: Data captured on a resource/association/sub-resource level giving insight into when that resource/association/sub-resource moved into a particular lifecycle stage, and who acted to move it into that specific lifecycle stage.

fields.name: time

type.name: Time
type.doc: Number of milliseconds since midnight, January 1, 1970 UTC. It must be a positive number

fields.doc: When did the resource/association/sub-resource move into the specific lifecycle stage represented by this AuditEvent.

fields.name: actor
fields.doc: The entity (e.g. a member URN) which will be credited for moving the resource/association/sub-resource into the specific lifecycle stage. It is also the one used to authorize the change.

fields.name: impersonator
fields.doc: The entity (e.g. a service URN) which performs the change on behalf of the Actor and must be authorized to act as the Actor.

fields.name: message
fields.doc: Additional context around how DataHub was informed of the particular change. For example: was the change created by an automated process, or manually.

models.name: BatchedTestResults
models.doc: Batched test results returning test results per entity

fields.name: results
failing
test
fields.doc: The urn of the test

fields.name: type
fields.doc: The type of the result

fields.name: testDefinitionMd5
fields.doc:
The md5 of the test definition that was used to compute this result.
See TestInfo.testDefinition.md5 for more information.

fields.name: lastComputed
fields.doc: The audit stamp of when the result was computed, including the actor who computed it.
Results that are failing

fields.name: passing
fields.doc: Results that are passing
Test result per entity

fields.name: type
fields.doc: The Test Definition Type

fields.name: json
fields.doc: JSON format configuration for the test

fields.name: md5
fields.doc:
MD5 hash of the test definition.
Computed by the server.
Used to stamp test results accurately.
See TestResult for more details.

fields.name: onQuery
fields.doc:
Optional search query to execute to get the assets this test applies to.
This only works with elastic search test executor and when evaluating a single test.

fields.name: name
fields.doc: The name of the test

fields.name: category
fields.doc: Category of the test - Operational, Governance, etc.

fields.name: description
fields.doc: Description of the test

fields.name: definition
fields.doc: Configuration for the Test

fields.name: lastUpdatedTimestamp
fields.doc: Timestamp when the test was last updated

fields.name: created
fields.doc: Created Audit stamp

fields.name: lastUpdated
fields.doc: Created Audit stamp

fields.name: status

type.name: TestStatus
type.doc: The status of a Metadata Test

fields.name: mode

symbolDocs.ACTIVE: The test is running on a schedule in the default running mode.
symbolDocs.INACTIVE: The test is paused, disabled, not running.

fields.doc: The evaluation mode of the Metadata Test.
The current status of the Metadata Test, e.g. whether it is actively running.

fields.name: source

type.name: TestSource
type.doc: The source of a metadata test

fields.name: type

symbolDocs.BULK_FORM_SUBMISSION: The test was system-generated to complete a bulk form submission task
symbolDocs.FORMS: The test was system-generated by the system for the FORMs feature.
symbolDocs.FORM_PROMPT:
The test was system-generated by the system for the FORMs feature to test
for form prompt completion.

fields.doc: The source type of the metadata test

fields.name: sourceEntity
fields.doc:
An optional source 'entity' that is responsible for this test.

This is currently only used for keeping track of the Form which owns a set of metadata tests.
The source of the metadata test, e.g. whether the test is user generated or system generated.

fields.name: schedule

type.name: TestSchedule
type.doc: The result of running a batch metadata test

fields.name: interval

symbolDocs.DAILY: This test runs once a day
symbolDocs.NONE: This test does not run on a schedule

fields.doc: The interval at which this metadata test is scheduled
Information about the schedule at which this test runs
